(audience applauding) (speaking in foreign language) My father will be in the game. A young soldier was working hard in Jin Shan company. He developed a set of software to help his father. At that time, not many software companies could hold these. We were just a one-sided strike. I remember that we spent three years working hard to develop a new office software. At that time, we planned to buy more than 20,000 sets. But we could not sell more than 2,000 sets. We lost in a one-time battle. Do we have to give up like this? He saw his name on the wall. He wanted to run our software on every computer. This was his dream as a programmer. What is the strategy of Jin Shan? First, we are a long-term war. We will not be defeated by a single day. Second, we will have a long-term war. We have to do whatever we want. We have to fight back. If we are in the Central Plains, we should not fight in the battlefield. The battle can be upgraded to a strategic level. Jin Shan has launched a series of software such as Jin Shan Duba, Jin Shan Yingba, and Jin Shan Ciba. They even started to enter the game field. The series of games such as Jianxia Qingyuan became the leading brand in the industry. These products have been a great contribution to Jin Shan's early difficulties and the creation of the brand. In 1997, Jin Shan began to work on the text processing software. WPS97 was launched. It became the first domestic software operating on the Windows system. In just two months, it sold 13,000 sets. It was the leader of the sales of various office software. Jin Shan was suppressed by Microsoft. Finally, he won the right to compete with Microsoft with market performance. [applause] When I was in the process of rebuilding Jin Shan, the world outside of Jin Shan changed dramatically. In Dayang Bi'an, this company may not be remembered, but it's called Netscape. It was founded in 1994 and was listed in 1995. Yahoo was founded in 1995 and was listed in 1996. The first wave of Internet wave was very popular. At that time, the whole world was in the Internet's hot trend. China followed up very quickly. In 1997, NetEase was founded. At the end of 1998, Tencent was founded. In 1998, Xinlang and Sohu were officially renamed and were restarted. The first wave of Internet wave in China also began. I was in October 1998 when I first felt that the Internet wave was unstoppable. We must catch up. But at that time, I thought we were half way there. What should we do? I suggested to the board of directors that we should buy a company that was just starting to be a small company. This way, we could quickly make a move. In the last 20 years, there have been many rumors in the market that Ma Huaten was going to sell QQ to me when he started his business. But I didn't buy it. And that Alibaba was going to invest in me when he started his business. But I didn't invest. It made me look stupid and stupid. I take this opportunity to make a statement. They didn't look for me. This is all a rumor. I don't know who made it up. How did they make me look so stupid? The only company I really talked about was NetEase. They started their business for more than a year. What did they do? They made a personal website. I think they did a good job. They also made an email system for the Guangzhou Telecom. I really like NetEase. I asked Ding Lei to buy the company for 10 million RMB. At that time, 10 million RMB was still a small number. There were about five or six people in the company. It was a small number. Ding Lei refused. Two months later, Ding Lei told me that he had invested 10 million US dollars. The company's share was more than 60 million US dollars. According to the exchange rate at that time, the company's valuation exceeded 500 million RMB. I was really shocked at that time. This Internet is really crazy. So after the acquisition failed, I decided to do it myself. But at that time, to be honest, we all have experience in software. The understanding of the Internet was still in the stage of use. So I tried for more than a year. Then one day I thought I understood. I think I have a new understanding of the Internet. This is my understanding of the Internet at that time. I said that the Internet is just a tool. I think all companies in the future will use the Internet. I think e-commerce has the most opportunities. This is the Internet I understood at that time. So I did e-commerce as I wanted. Of course, we had high expectations of ourselves. We put a lot of effort into it and made a lot of preparations. In May 2000, the Zuo Yue network was officially online. At that time, I was confident in the Internet. At that time, many people wanted to invest in Zuo Yue network. I refused. I said, "We can do it ourselves." At that time, the Internet was broken. The global capital market entered the winter. This news did not shake me at all. The first money of Zuo Yue network, 20 million RMB, was all invested by the shareholders of Jin Shan. Speaking of Zuo Yue network, I think e-commerce is essentially retail. I have been studying and studying the retail industry for years. I used it all. It's all about selection, pricing, store decoration, and the movement. I quickly transferred these traditional retail ideas to e-commerce. I think the second feature of e-commerce is operation. It requires a lot of details. Every detail is done well. I remember that I went to work every morning. I clicked on every link on Zuo Yue network. To be honest, I clicked on almost every link. I shared my views with my classmates. I said, "I am a programmer." I said, "What is the most important thing I learned in software engineering?" "It is that the possible errors will definitely be made." "So you must check every place." Even today, we hold a press conference and a speech. I said, "If your eyes are on a computer," "I can tell you that there will be errors." "So we have two exactly the same computers" "every time we have a press conference." "So as long as you use this spirit of competition" "to do every little thing, it will definitely be done well." At the same time, I asked for every day, after every day, we must summarize and review the day. At the same time, we look at the competitors. How to adjust and improve the next day. In addition, in order to test the service of Zuo Yue network, I bought a lot of things every week. So in my office, I put a lot of books, movies, TV series, and music CDs everywhere in the bookshelf. And I didn't even take out the packaging for many years. I bought too many. So during that time, my colleagues really liked to go to my office for meetings. After the meeting, they left in a hurry. In the end, it was all the books that everyone helped me read. So at that time, I had a lot of books on the shelf. And in order to think about how to make the e-commerce good, how to make the service good, we also made a lot of innovations. For example, we opened the earliest multi-storey warehouse in China. This is Beijing, Shanghai, Shenzhen, and Shenzhen. We also started building our own logistics at the earliest. Because in order to ensure the quality of the service, we even exaggeratedly proposed the four-hour delivery to Beijing, Shanghai, and Guangzhou. That is, everything must be delivered in four hours. So we operated the e-commerce business in a almost perverted way. In two or three years, from scratch, we became the largest Chinese B-Line e-commerce company at the time. [applause] Maybe today, many people still remember the story of the Big Wall, the Little Prince, and the love story of Tokyo. These are all the products that the e-commerce network has recommended. These are the first generation products on the Chinese e-commerce network. They were all bought on the e-commerce network. The business of the e-commerce network has been progressing very smoothly. There is only one difficulty. There is no money. Because it is too expensive to use the e-commerce platform. It is too expensive. First, the time is the winter of capital. Secondly, the VCs at the time were all foreign companies. A local entrepreneur like me who has never been abroad, and has poor English, it is quite difficult to integrate with a group of foreigners. At that time, I prepared a 100-page English version of the B-P, and went to visit each and every one of them. I remember that I looked for all the VCs I could find at that time. I also have a list of more than 30 companies. I think that our business was doing very well at that time. There was no one company willing to invest. It was also very broken at that time. Finally, in the case of no way, a friend's company invested 1 million dollars. The shareholders of the stock market also chased the price of 1 million dollars, and then they forced to complete the second round of financing. I remember that the start-up of the Zuo Wei Wang was the process of us constantly looking for money and constantly suffering. In 2004, we really couldn't stand it anymore. We could only sell Zuo Wei Wang to Amazon, which was later Amazon China. A few years ago, I visited Bezos. He told me that he was sorry that he didn't take good care of Zuo Yue. So, I think that this process was very painful. Because after we sold it for half a year, the Internet was in a new wave of popularity. And the B2C store was in a great situation. The entire e-commerce industry was in a complete crisis. I will summarize Zuo Yue Wang in this way. It was created after the Internet bubble was broken, and then it fell before the e-commerce industry was in a complete crisis. This is really a painful story for the ancient people. After I sold Zuo Yue, there were always people who asked me if I regretted it. I said that I didn't regret it. I can't say that I regretted it even if I died. But I was actually very, very painful and suffering. On the one hand, the entrepreneurs are like children to the companies they set up. So, I was very, very painful at that stage. I was trying to cut the relationship between me and Zuo Yue Wang. I asked myself not to go to Zuo Yue Wang's office, not to buy things on Zuo Yue Wang, and not to meet Zuo Yue Wang's old colleagues except for Chen Lian Yuan. Basically, I tried not to meet them. I think the second point is more painful for an entrepreneur. We have lost the Internet era. So, I was very, very painful at that time. I kept asking myself where I was lost. Anyway, let's take a closer look. It seems that I was just unlucky. You say that we don't do it when it's easy to make money. We do it when people are in a bad situation. If you keep doing it for half a year, the situation will be better. Anyway, I thought I was unlucky at that time. I was joking with them. I said that I would start a business in the future and look at the wind and water. One life, two lives, three wind and water. I was joking. But the more I think about it, I think we don't care about timing and actual choices. Why do we have to be in the same boat after the wind and water are gone? Why can't we do it earlier? So, we lost the race line. We missed the best starting point. We were not able to keep up with ourselves. We didn't keep up with the time when the refugees arrived. So, this gave me a big inspiration. I think it takes a little luck to start a business. It really needs to make accurate judgments about big things. And no matter how smart you are, how diligent you are, I think you should never underestimate the importance of wind and water. So, why did I talk about wind and water later? I think many smart and diligent people don't care about the importance of opportunity. Opportunity is very important to everyone. So, I spent half a year to get over it step by step. In the process, I asked myself, "What is the Internet? Is there still an opportunity? What can we do next?" After thinking about it over and over again, to be honest, I really understood the Internet a lot. This is my understanding in 2005. I wrote it down. I said, "The Internet is not only a technological revolution, but also a critical revolution. The second is that the future of the Internet will be integrated into all industries and industries." This is probably nothing today. This is the summary of 2005. In fact, these two sentences are what we talked about later, the Internet thinking and the Internet home. Today, I think that the understanding of 2005 is really reliable. After having this high-level understanding, I again scanned all the new opportunities in the industry. I think that at this time, my vision is completely different. In 2005, the market was spreading the word that the 3G network would be open soon. At that time, I saw a huge opportunity. The mobile Internet. After a deep study, I firmly believe that the future of the Internet will be a time of mobile Internet. And the mobile Internet will be larger than the PC Internet. At that time, I firmly believed that and at all meetings and all occasions, I was always boasting. I was joking. I said, "I must be the first group of boasters in China's mobile Internet." But boasting is useless. I decided to act immediately. In fact, I did two things in this action. These things are not complicated. First, I want to be the first group of real users. Second, I want to be the first participant of this wave. Is it simple? These two. In fact, it's quite simple. But it's quite difficult to do. Because more than ten years ago, the mobile phone was a functional machine. The screen was very small. The Internet was 2G, 2.5G. The speed was very slow. In fact, I don't know who was using such a slow mobile phone on the Internet. Especially, you see, we use computers, we use bandwidth. We spend more than ten hours a day on the Internet. It's very painful to use a mobile phone. My idea was that no matter how difficult it was, I wanted to start from today. I tried to use mobile phone only. I tried not to use computers. I had used computers for more than 20 years. I said, "I don't need computers." I made a huge decision. It was very, very broken. OK, let me show you. At that time, such a mobile phone, such a small screen, such a small word. And then the computer can't be used. I can only use my mobile phone. So, in this very painful suffering, I saw many, many opportunities for mobile phone. I made mobile phone products. Many of them are due to these painful experiences at that time. So I think pain is not a bad thing. I think where is the pain of the user, where is the pain of the user, where is the opportunity for us entrepreneurs? So I just use it every day, every day, every day is very painful. This habit lasted about ten years. I started using computers in the early years. Then I said, "I don't just want to be a user, I also want to be a participant in this industry, I want to go deep into the forefront of this wave." At that time, I searched the whole street, saying, "Who is doing mobile Internet? I am willing to invest money." I used the way of Angel investment to participate in a large number of startup companies. I remember the first one was launched in January 2006. Then I launched more than ten more. Then the most famous one was UCWeb. Many people may know this, they have used it. Then UCWeb. After these years of deep learning, I believe that a new era is really coming, which is mobile Internet. In 2007, I started using 19 years of Jinshan software, and it finally went public. I also left Jinshan software, which I worked hard for 16 years, and started a different life. In the next three years, I did Angel investment and systematic reflection and summary. In this series of reflection, I made a careful preparation for the next journey. Today, I shared three stories of my experience in the stock market. When I faced these setbacks and failures, I was confused, I was shaken, and even gave up. But today, I want to tell you that if there are no setbacks, failures, and failures, there will be no Neijun today. No one likes setbacks and failures. But what we can't avoid is that we all face setbacks and failures. And I believe that at this moment, there should be many people who are in setbacks and failures, who are in confusion and anxiety. Since these pains are hard to avoid, I think we shouldn't avoid them. We should face these pains, and move forward in these pains, so that pain can create a better us. This is the meaning of pain and the setbacks I talked about today. Finally, I will use one sentence to summarize my speech today. All the setbacks and failures you have experienced, and even those things that seem meaningless and time-consuming, will become your most important and most precious wealth. Life is long, so let's keep our faith and believe that the good things will happen.

And no matter how smart you are, how diligent you are,
I think you should never underestimate the importance of wind and water.
So, why did I talk about wind and water later?
I think many smart and diligent people don't care about the importance of opportunity.
Opportunity is very important to everyone.
So, I spent half a year to get over it step by step.
In the process, I asked myself,
"What is the Internet?
Is there still an opportunity?
What can we do next?"
After thinking about it over and over again,
to be honest, I really understood the Internet a lot.
This is my understanding in 2005.
I wrote it down.
I said, "The Internet is not only a technological revolution,
but also a critical revolution.
The second is that the future of the Internet will be integrated into all industries and industries."
This is probably nothing today. This is the summary of 2005.
In fact, these two sentences are what we talked about later,
the Internet thinking and the Internet home.
Today, I think that the understanding of 2005 is really reliable.
After having this high-level understanding,
I again scanned all the new opportunities in the industry.
I think that at this time, my vision is completely different.
In 2005, the market was spreading the word that the 3G network would be open soon.
At that time, I saw a huge opportunity.
The mobile Internet.
After a deep study, I firmly believe
that the future of the Internet will be a time of mobile Internet.
And the mobile Internet will be larger than the PC Internet.
At that time, I firmly believed that
and at all meetings and all occasions, I was always boasting.
I was joking.
I said, "I must be the first group of boasters in China's mobile Internet."
But boasting is useless.
I decided to act immediately.
In fact, I did two things in this action.
These things are not complicated.
First, I want to be the first group of real users.
Second, I want to be the first participant of this wave.
Is it simple? These two.
In fact, it's quite simple.
But it's quite difficult to do.
Because more than ten years ago,
the mobile phone was a functional machine.
The screen was very small.
The Internet was 2G, 2.5G.
The speed was very slow.
In fact, I don't know who was using such a slow mobile phone on the Internet.
Especially, you see, we use computers, we use bandwidth.
We spend more than ten hours a day on the Internet.
It's very painful to use a mobile phone.
My idea was that no matter how difficult it was,
I wanted to start from today.
I tried to use mobile phone only.
I tried not to use computers.
I had used computers for more than 20 years.
I said, "I don't need computers."
I made a huge decision. It was very, very broken.
OK, let me show you.
At that time, such a mobile phone,
such a small screen, such a small word.
And then the computer can't be used.
I can only use my mobile phone.
So, in this very painful suffering,
I saw many, many opportunities for mobile phone.
I made mobile phone products.
Many of them are due to these painful experiences at that time.
So I think pain is not a bad thing.
I think where is the pain of the user,
where is the pain of the user,
where is the opportunity for us entrepreneurs?
So I just use it every day, every day, every day is very painful.
This habit lasted about ten years.
I started using computers in the early years.
Then I said, "I don't just want to be a user,
I also want to be a participant in this industry,
I want to go deep into the forefront of this wave."
At that time, I searched the whole street,
saying, "Who is doing mobile Internet? I am willing to invest money."
I used the way of Angel investment
to participate in a large number of startup companies.
I remember the first one was launched in January 2006.
Then I launched more than ten more.
Then the most famous one was UCWeb.
Many people may know this, they have used it.
Then UCWeb.
After these years of deep learning,
I believe that a new era is really coming,
which is mobile Internet.
In 2007, I started using 19 years of Jinshan software,
and it finally went public.
I also left Jinshan software, which I worked hard for 16 years,
and started a different life.
In the next three years,
I did Angel investment and systematic reflection and summary.
In this series of reflection,
I made a careful preparation for the next journey.
Today, I shared three stories of my experience in the stock market.
When I faced these setbacks and failures,
I was confused, I was shaken, and even gave up.
But today, I want to tell you that
if there are no setbacks, failures,
and failures,
there will be no Neijun today.
No one likes setbacks and failures.
But what we can't avoid is that
we all face setbacks and failures.
And I believe that
at this moment, there should be many people
who are in setbacks and failures,
who are in confusion and anxiety.
Since these pains are hard to avoid,
I think we shouldn't avoid them.
We should face these pains,
and move forward in these pains,
so that pain can create a better us.
This is the meaning of pain and the setbacks I talked about today.
Finally, I will use one sentence to summarize my speech today.
All the setbacks and failures you have experienced,
and even those things that seem meaningless
and time-consuming, will become your most important
and most precious wealth.
Life is long, so let's keep our faith
and believe that the good things will happen.
